title: Training and Development Managers
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate the training and development activities and staff of an organization.

tasks.text: Analyze training needs to develop new training programs or modify and improve existing programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate instructor performance and the effectiveness of training programs, providing recommendations for improvement.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan, develop, and provide training and staff development programs, using knowledge of the effectiveness of methods such as classroom training, demonstrations, on-the-job training, meetings, conferences, and workshops.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with management and conduct surveys to identify training needs based on projected production processes, changes, and other factors.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct orientation sessions and arrange on-the-job training for new hires.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Train instructors and supervisors in techniques and skills for training and dealing with employees.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop and organize training manuals, multimedia visual aids, and other educational materials.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare training budget for department or organization.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct or arrange for ongoing technical training and personal development classes for staff members.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review and evaluate training and apprenticeship programs for compliance with government standards.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Coordinate established courses with technical and professional courses provided by community schools, and designate training procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
